progress_summary: Six PRs merged this session (#140 mobile-demo previews, #143 Direction A workbench, #146 mobile architecture, #148 UI tweaks bundle, #150 checkpoints-as-docs + tooling, #151 PostHog reverse-proxy). All deployed to staging and production. Auto-stamp workflow needed a fix (this PR) — branch protection blocks direct pushes to main, so it now opens a PR with auto-merge instead.

key_decisions: Original ask: mobile /demo + 10x /ux-engineer loop with 5 HTML previews before implementation.
Architecture and demo both use single-route + CSS-breakpoint swap at 767px (no UA sniff, no parallel route).
Round-3 UX tweaks: replaced static page-summary card and OnboardingTour with a single one-step WelcomePopup (DNS via localStorage). Workbench is now full-bleed.
Feedback pill on desktop moved to top-right (top:1rem right:1rem z:100) so it clears the sticky header. Mobile unchanged.

Skill detail TOC: rest color var(--subtle) blends into bg, region hover → var(--text), per-link hover → var(--accent). Click-to-flash bumps the matching heading and fades ember→cream over 10s; honors prefers-reduced-motion.
Restored visually-hidden h1 on /demo to satisfy routes.spec.ts and a11y after dropping the page-summary card.
user_preferences: Pragmatic, brand-on voice. Picks defaults willingly ("go ahead and implement option A fully").
Wants previews + clarifying questions before non-trivial UI changes.
Comfortable merging promptly once CI is green; deploy is always manual.

next_actions: Session done — open a fresh session to start the next thing.
Run npm run checkpoint:status at the top of the next session to resume.
